channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Dreame va s’inviter dans votre cuisine et votre salon en 2026 : voici ses nouveaux appareils connectés [Sponso]
item.description: Dreame voit grand pour la France en 2026 ! Bien connue pour ses aspirateurs robots, la marque lance cette année de nouvelles références, mais dans le domaine du gros électroménager.

item.title: Nothing Headphone A Review: A Little More Colorful and a Little Less Good
item.description: The Headphone A may be $100 less than the Headphone 1, but there are some compromises to consider.

item.title: Suunto Vertical 2 Review: Catching Up to the Pack
item.description: Suunto's latest adventure fitness tracker finally introduces a bright AMOLED screen that's great for maps.

item.title: Amazon fait -40 % sur de bons petits écouteurs Huawei qui misent sur le confort et l’autonomie
item.description: Les Huawei FreeBuds SE 3 sont des écouteurs boutons légers, d'entrée de gamme, avec un accent sur le confort et la praticité plutôt que sur l'audio pur. Ils passent de 49,99 euros à 29,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Microsoft Teams wants to make it easier to forget all your embarrassing meeting mistakes
item.description: Microsoft Teams meeting content can now be quickly deleted.

item.title: Nothing présente son casque le plus accessible, le Nothing Headphone (a)
item.description: La marque britannique Nothing dévoile aujourd’hui son nouveau casque audio, le Nothing Headphone (a), disponible dès maintenant au prix de 159 euros. Un modèle plus abordable qui promet jusqu’à 135 heures d’écoute.

item.title: This Absurdly Complex Star Destroyer Model May Be the Most Detailed Ever Created
item.description: It has 172,340 pieces and just under 1.4 billion triangles, and it induced a panic attack in our copy of Blender.

item.title: Nothing Phone (4a) et (4a) Pro : des nouveaux coloris et une Glyph Bar revisitée
item.description: Nothing annonce aujourd’hui la sortie de deux nouveaux smartphones, le Nothing Phone (4a) et le Nothing Phone (4a) Pro. Deux modèles de milieu de gamme qui misent sur un design retravaillé sans rogner sur les performances.

item.title: Nothing Now Has a Cheaper Version of One of 2025’s Best Wireless Headphones
item.description: The Headphone A come in new colors, but not all of them are here to stay.

item.title: Nothing Phone 4a hands-on: A more technically accomplished entry-level smartphone
item.description: Nothing is back with two new smartphones, the entry-level Phone 4a and the mid-range Phone 4a Pro. With the base 4a in particular, there’s no shortage of substantial hardware upgrades since the 3a, even if the design doesn’t quite stand out as much. This year, that’s apparently the role of the Nothing Phone 4a Pro. That said, the base 4a’s two new color options (blue and pink) are gorgeous additions to the usual monochrome duo of white and black. There have been many upgrades since 2025’s Phone 3a. It comes with IP64 dust and water resistance, and is also physically tougher: Nothing says it ha...

item.title: Nothing's new over-ear headphones can pump out the jams for five days on a single charge
item.description: Nothing just revealed a new pair of over-ear headphones as a relatively budget-friendly alternative to the pre-existing Headphone 1. The Headphone (a) earphones feature a similar design language to the company's previous cans, but with more color. As a matter of fact, these will be available in four colors, including yellow, pink, white and black. Perhaps the most notable feature here, however, is the battery life. Nothing says these headphones will last over five days on a single charge. That's not five days of regular use, working out to several hours each day or whatever. It claims 135 hour...

item.title: Nothing Has 2 New Midrange Phones, but Only 1 Will Be Sold in the US
item.description: Nothing won't launch a flagship phone this year, but the colorful and affordable Phone (4a), Phone (4a) Pro, and Headphone (a) are here to fill the void.

item.title: Nothing’s Headphone A are something worth considering
item.description: After the release of the Headphone 1 last year - Nothing's first over-ear headphones - the company is back with the Headphone A. They're a slimmed-down over-ear option that keep the Nothing design aesthetic and excellent controls while decreasing the weight and bumping battery life up to a maximum of 135 hours. There are some […]

item.title: Nothing is finally covering up with the metal Phone 4A Pro
item.description: Today Nothing has revealed the 4A and 4A Pro, its latest midrange phones. The two look startlingly different from one another, with varying designs and Glyph Light interfaces. The Pro is especially striking: it's the first Nothing phone to almost entirely abandon the brand's trademark transparent design. I'm currently at Nothing's launch event in London, […]...

item.title: I reviewed Nothing's new budget phone, and it's a sleek, steady performer that impressed me so much that I might not go back to my Samsung
item.description: Nothing's new budget-friendly mobile wowed me with its stand-out design and impressive performance, making it easy to recommend.

item.title: I didn't think it could be done — the Nothing Headphone (a) fix all the problems of the original while being way cheaper
item.description: Nothing's new cheaper headphones are the dream version 2.0 of a product — better and way cheaper than the original

item.title: The Nothing Headphone (a) are here, and they rock — here are 5 things you need to know about them
item.description: Nothing's new noise-cancelling headphones are half the price of the Headphone (1), but far from half the quality

item.title: Nothing's Phone 4a Pro picks up flagship features and an even brighter display for $499
item.description: Back in January, Nothing shared that it wouldn't be releasing its flagship Nothing Phone 4 in 2026, and instead focusing on follow-ups to its midrange Phone 3a and Phone 3a Pro. After some expected teasing, those sequels have arrived: the Phone 4a Pro and Phone 4a. And like Nothing's previous devices, they seem like meaningful departures from what the company has tried in the past.The Nothing 4a Pro represents the biggest change. Gone is the translucent back meant to offer a pseudo-glimpse into the internals of the phone, and in its place is a metal unibody design in black, silver or pink, and...

item.title: Un châssis en métal comme l’iPhone, mais à moins de 500€ : Nothing frappe très fort avec le Phone (4a) Pro
item.description: Nothing dévoile le Phone (4a) Pro, un smartphone qui change radicalement son approche avec un design en métal unibody et le zoom périscopique du plus onéreux Phone (3).

item.title: Un zoom périscopique à 369 euros, on a testé le Nothing Phone (4a)
item.description: Avec sa gamme « a », Nothing a su bousculer les codes du milieu de gamme en alliant design clivant et performances équilibrées. Le nouveau Nothing Phone (4a) entend transformer l'essai en musclant sa partition photographique, notamment grâce à l'héritage du zoom périscopique de la version Pro.

item.title: Marre du bruit de roulement en voiture ? ZF invente l’amortisseur qui annule les sons parasites
item.description: L’équipementier allemand ZF vient de mettre au point un amortissement intelligent, capable de supprimer les vibrations acoustiques du châssis et des pneus. Résultat : les voitures électriques pourraient faire encore moins de bruit dans les prochaines années.

item.title: How to Survive Daylight Saving Time: Start Early (2026)
item.description: Forcing your body to wake up a full hour earlier out of nowhere will be as brutal as it sounds. Instead, start early and add some light to your routine.

item.title: WWE 2K26 review: The game keeps getting better, the monetization keeps getting worse
item.description: WWE 2K26 takes one step forward and two steps back by infusing the series' best wrestling game to date with obnoxious monetization and a scaled-back MyRise campaign.

item.title: Major data leak forum LeakBase seized by FBI, Europol, and shut down
item.description: The website was taken offline, and potential members arrested.

item.title: Voitures électriques : l’arme secrète du Maroc qui attire les constructeurs chinois
item.description: Au fil des années, et en toute discrétion, le Maroc a su s’imposer auprès des constructeurs chinois. Ces derniers y produisent des batteries de voitures électriques destinées à l’Europe, afin de contourner les droits de douane.

item.title: The rumors were true! Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced has officially been announced by Ubisoft — 'Some whispers have a little more wind in their sails. Keep your spyglass on the horizon'
item.description: Following months of leaks and rumors, Ubisoft has officially confirmed the existence of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced with the first piece of the remake's concept art.

item.title: Google reportedly muzzles Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney until 2032
item.description: Epic Games’ courtroom battle with Google is over, but it’s reportedly going to affect how its CEO can speak about the tech giant for years for years to come. According to The Verge, part of the settlement terms Epic had signed has a clause stating that Epic and Sweeney will have to speak positively about Google’s competitiveness and app store operations going forward. “Epic believes that the Google and Android platform, with the changes in this term sheet, are procompetitive and a model for app store / platform operations, and will make good faith efforts to advocate for the same,” the clause ...

item.title: Le plus beau des Assassin’s Creed est enfin jouable à 60 FPS sur console
item.description: Plus d'une décennie après son lancement pour le moins chaotique, Assassin's Creed Unity va s'offrir un retour sur le devant de la scène. Ubisoft déploie une mise à jour gratuite permettant enfin d'arpenter les rues de Paris en 60 images par seconde sur les consoles de dernière génération.

item.title: Fuite de données : « l’un des plus grands » marchés noirs au monde a été saisi par le FBI
item.description: Les autorités américaines et européennes viennent de porter un grand coup à l'économie des données volées. LeakBase, l’un des plus grands forums au monde dédiés à la revente d'informations piratées, vient d'être saisi par le FBI. Baptisée « Opération Leak », cette action coordonnée risque d'exposer 142 000 hackers...

item.title: Vélos électriques : un projet de loi veut leur imposer une plaque d’immatriculation en Californie
item.description: Un projet de loi californien propose d'imposer une plaque d'immatriculation aux vélos électriques de Classe 2 et 3, marquant un tournant réglementaire qui pourrait transformer le statut de ces engins jusqu'ici assimilés à de simples vélos électriques.

item.title: Best Sheets Under $200 and $100 (2026): Cotton, Bamboo, Organic
item.description: After sleeping on more than 70 different sets of sheets, these are the best sets that won't break the bank.

item.title: Don’t Let Industry Jargon Cost You When Shopping for a Smart Bed
item.description: Why the terms “smart bed,” "adjustable mattress," and “adjustable frame” are not interchangeable, and how to avoid an expensive mistake.

item.title: MacBook Neo : le laptop le moins cher d’Apple est disponible en précommande, mais à quel prix ?
item.description: Apple vient de dévoiler le MacBook Neo, le PC portable le plus abordable de sa gamme. Les précommandes sont dès à présent disponibles chez tous les e-commerçants. Découvrez où l'obtenir au meilleur prix.

item.title: AI Agents Love to Hodl Bitcoin and Spend Stablecoins, Study Finds
item.description: The preference for bitcoin as a long-term store of value was referred to as the most dominant response in the recent Bitcoin Policy Institute report at 79.1%.

item.title: La fin du « laisser-faire » dans la collecte de données personnelles ? La justice confirme l’amende monstre imposée à Criteo
item.description: Le dépôt de cookies en dehors des clous du RGPD, c'est terminé ? Le Conseil d'État, la plus haute juridiction administrative, a validé mercredi 4 mars l'amende salée de 40 millions d'euros imposée à Criteo, spécialiste de la publicité ciblée, en 2023.

item.title: Bill Gates’ nuclear company is the first to get approval to build next-gen reactor
item.description: Bill Gates-founded nuclear energy startup TerraPower has been granted approval from the Nuclear Regulatory Commission to build a next-generation reactor in Wyoming. This is the first commercial-scale, advanced nuclear power plant to ever receive the federal permit, according to the press release, and will be the first commercial reactor constructed in the US in almost […]...

item.title: Batterie de 9600 mAh au lieu de 5600 : ce YouTuber fait la leçon à Samsung
item.description: Et si votre smartphone pouvait tenir deux fois plus longtemps sans grossir ? C'est la promesse de la technologie silicium-carbone d'Honor. Pour le prouver, un YouTuber a hacké un Galaxy Z TriFold de Samsung pour y injecter cette nouvelle chimie.

item.title: The Pentagon-Anthropic feud is quietly obscuring the real fight over military AI
item.description: The fight over how the military can use large language models is narrowing the scope of an urgent debate. The controversy over the Pentagon’s use of Anthropic’s models has become a flashpoint in the national debate over military artificial intelligence, and sparked outrage from Washington to Silicon Valley. The Pentagon wanted to buy Anthropic’s AI models without any restrictions on their use; even as it scrapped its flagship safety rule, the company wouldn’t budge on two particular red lines. And so, just after a Friday evening deadline, the Secretary of War killed the company’s $200 million ...

item.title: NYT Mini crossword answers, hints for March 5, 2026
item.description: Answers to each clue for the March 5, 2026 edition of NYT's The Mini crossword puzzle.

item.title: Plus de 27 000 € pour ce break électrique SAIC : il ressemble à une Porsche et embarque une technologie Huawei
item.description: La marque chinoise SAIC vient de lever le voile sur sa toute nouvelle Z7T. Et si cette voiture électrique vous dit quelque chose, c’est tout à fait normal, car on dirait un simple copier / coller de la Porsche Taycan.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 5, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 5, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1720 on March 5 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 5, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for March 5, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures mini imprimantes photos portables en 2026 ?
item.description: Imprimer des photos depuis son smartphone ou sa tablette, c'est désormais possible grâce à une mini imprimante photo portable. Voici notre sélection des meilleures imprimantes photo pour smartphone, avec plusieurs formats et différentes technologies d'impression.

item.title: ChatGPT veut s’approprier votre manière d’écrire
item.description: OpenAI travaillerait sur une nouvelle option capable de créer des modèles d’écriture à partir du style de ses utilisateurs. Le chatbot pourrait ainsi adapter son ton au contexte dans lequel on l’utilise. De quoi rendre la distinction entre la machine et l’humain encore plus difficile.

item.title: Most cheap robot vacuums suck, but these 4 dont — take it from a professional vacuum tester
item.description: After putting 15+ budget robovacs through realistic at-home cleaning tests, we found four affordable robot vacuums that actually work hard.

item.title: Microsoft, Europol take down global phishing as a service network which was able to bypass 2FA with ease
item.description: Tycoon 2FA is no more thanks to a major law enforcement operation.

item.title: The best 9 dating apps for men who are tired of being alone
item.description: Which dating apps for men actually work? We reviewed the top options for every type of guy, including Tinder, Hinge, and EliteSingles.

item.title: Former Military Officials, Academics, and Tech Policy Leaders Denounce Pentagon’s Tactics Against Anthropic
item.description: "The future of American innovation in AI, the rule of law, and the constitutional boundaries of executive power are all on the line, and they are yours to defend."

item.title: How a Music Streaming CEO Built an Open-Source Global Threat Map in His Spare Time
item.description: Frustrated by fragmented war news, Anghami’s Elie Habib built World Monitor, a platform that fuses global data, like aircraft signals and satellite detections, to track conflicts as they unfold.

item.title: How to watch India vs England: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for T20 World Cup semi-final 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch India vs England live streams online – including for FREE – for this 2026 T20 World Cup semi-final clash at Wankhede Stadium.

item.title: The new Galaxy S26 Ultra isn’t much to shout about
item.description: The company is losing the technological edge it built its reputation upon. When you visit the Samsung booth this week at the Mobile World Congress 2026—which, as always, is being held at the Fira Gran Via convention center in Barcelona—you can make your way past the array of brand-new devices to find a timeline of old Galaxy S phones mounted to a wall....

item.title: How to unblock Pornhub for free in Mississippi
item.description: How to unblock porn for free in Mississippi. Unblock and watch Pornhub for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Make PDFs easier to manage forever with this $24 tool
item.description: Stop battling with PDFs with some help from this AcePDF Converter and Editor lifetime license, on sale now for $23.97 through March 8.

item.title: Upgrade to a MacBook Pro for under $500
item.description: Get a Grade A refurbished MacBook Pro (2020) with i7, 16GB RAM, and 512GB SSD for $479.99 (reg. $1,999).

item.title: The Looksmaxxing Glossary: Every term you need to understand the Internets most unhinged subculture
item.description: The Looksmaxxing Glossary: Understanding the Internet's most unhinged subculture

item.title: Whats new to streaming this week? (March 6, 2026)
item.description: What’s new to streaming for the week of March 6, 2026, on Netflix, HBO Max, Hulu, and more? We've got you covered.

item.title: How to watch India vs. England in the 2026 T20 World Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch T20 World Cup for free. Live stream India vs. England in the 2026 T20 World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Lego is giving away free Star Wars Lightsabers — how to claim yours
item.description: The best free Lego deal in February 2026. Lego is giving away exclusive Star Wars Lightsabers for free on March 8.

item.title: The Soundcore AeroClip earbuds just got a $60 discount — but it won’t be around for long
item.description: Get the best earbuds deal. Save 35% on the Soundcore AeroClip earbuds at Amazon.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Tarkir Dragonstorm Play Booster Box is now below $110 at Walmart — save vs. TCGplayer and Amazon
item.description: The Magic: The Gathering Tarkir Dragonstorm Play Booster Box is down to $109.98 at Walmart, beating Amazon and TCGplayer.

item.title: Le MacBook Neo vous préviendra si vous branchez un écran sur le mauvais port
item.description: Un seul des deux ports du MacBook Neo peut accueillir un écran externe. Heureusement, Apple a prévu le coup avec un système de notification bien pratique au sein de macOS.

item.title: Moins de 100 € pour cet aspirateur balai léger, mais puissant : une bonne alternative à Dyson
item.description: Le Dreame U20 est un aspirateur-balai pour un nettoyage sec, conçu pour aspirer les poussières, les débris et les poils d'animaux efficacement. Il se retrouve à 98,18 euros sur PC Componentes au lieu de 199 euros.

item.title: How to watch AFL live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch AFL for free. Live stream the 2026 AFL for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Pokémon TCG: Perfect Order Booster Box preorders are $220 at Walmart — save vs. Amazon and TCGplayer
item.description: Walmart has Perfect Order Booster Boxes for $219.98, beating Amazon by $50 and undercutting TCGplayer’s shipped price.

item.title: The Roborock Qrevo S5V robot vacuum is $350 off at Amazon — act fast to save
item.description: Get the best robot vacuum deal on Amazon. Save 39% on the Roborock Qrevo S5V at Amazon right now.
